rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Fam. Code §65.104 governs the maximum effective period of truancy court remedial orders. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matter and share no operative dependency.
quote: A truancy court's remedial order under Section 65.103 is effective until the later of:
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and the truancy remedial order statute.
